title: Chinnakuyil Paadum
lyrics:
Chinna kuyil paadum paattu keladaa
En selva kaadhalane

Unnaith thaane kalyanam seithu kolven
Ullathile palliyarai pottu vaippen

Chinna kuyil paadum paattu keladaa
En selva kaadhalane

Muthu muthaa pookal poothu
Kullukudhe mulla kodi
Kitta vandhu katti kolla
Solluthudhe intha chedi

Thottu thottu pesida
Thudikuthe en manam
Vittu vittu poguma
Intha inba uravam

Unnaith thaane kalyanam seithu kolven
Ullathile palliyarai pottu vaippen

title: Yamunai Aatrile
lyrics:
Yamunai aatrile eera kaatrile
Kannanodu thaan aada
Paarvai poothida paadhai paarthida
Paavai raadhaiyo vaada

Iravum ponathu pagalumn ponathu
Mannan illaiye kooda
Ilayum uthirnthathu kilaiyum azhuthathu
Illai innum thoothu

Kannan naayagan pinnum oodinaan
Kangal theduthe thadaam
Raadhai thedinaal kaadhal porinaal
Sengal paaduthe naadham

Yamunai aatrile eera kaatrile
Kannanodu thaan aada

title: Ooru Sanam
lyrics:
Ooru sanam thoongiruchu
Ootha kaathum adichiruchu
Paavi manam thoongalaye
Athu yeno puriyalaye

Kuyilu karunguyilu maaman
Kuralu kekkalaye
Maiyilu ilamayilu thogai
Virichum aadaiyile

Thendral kaathu veesiyum
Then malar poothum
Enna laabam enna laabam
Maaman illaye

Ooru sanam thoongiruchu
Ootha kaathum adichiruchu
Paavi manam thoongalaye

title: Inji Iduppazhagi
lyrics:
Inji iduppazhagi
Manja sivappazhagi
Kallach sirippazhagi
Marakka manam kooduthillaiye

Marakka manam kooduthillaiye
Thirumba unnai theduthu
En usuru aasaigalai kooruthu

Santhana pottazhagi
Sathiya satchiyada
Kannu muzhi paarthaa
Kavithai kotti theeruthu

Inji iduppazhagi
Manja sivappazhagi
Kallach sirippazhagi
Marakka manam kooduthillaiye

title: Kannan Vandhu
lyrics:
Kannan vandhu paadugindraan
Kaalamellam vaazhugindraan
Ennai anbi aalum mannan

Nenjile inbam kondu
Paadugindraan kannan
Kannile vannam kondu
Thedugindraan mannan

Sollile thean kotti
Suvaiyai aakinaan
Pillai pol yennai aakinaan

Kannan vandhu paadugindraan
Kaalamellam vaazhugindraan

title: Sendhoora Poove
lyrics:
Sendhoora poove sendhoora poove
Jillenra kaatre
En mannan enge en mannan enge
Nee konjam sollaayo

Thendralai thoodhu vittu
Oru sethi ketaen
Kangalil neerai vittu
Naan kaathu nindraen

Vasantham varum neram
En mannan varuvaana
Azhagu mugam kaati
Ennai aazhvaana

Sendhoora poove sendhoora poove
Jillenra kaatre

title: Valaiyosai
lyrics:
Valaiyosai kala kala vena
Kavithaigal padikuthu
Kulu kulu thendral kaatrum veesuthu

Sila neram silu silu vena
Siru viral pada pada
Thudikuthu engum inbam pesuthu

Unakkena pirandhava naan
Enakkena pirandhavan nee
Iruvarum oruvarai oruvar
Purinthu kondom

Valaiyosai kala kala vena
Kavithaigal padikuthu
Kulu kulu thendral kaatrum veesuthu

title: Azhagu Malar Aada
lyrics:
Azhagu malar aada abinayangal kooda
Silambu oli koova
Sirippu oli thoova

Vaanin meethu megam
Paadum paattu enna
Kaatril aadum poovum
Koorum sethi enna

Nenjil aasaigal pongiduthe
Kannil minnalgal thondriduthe
Inba thene unnai thaane

Azhagu malar aada abinayangal kooda
Silambu oli koova

title: Thendral Vandhu
lyrics:
Thendral vandhu theendum pothu
Enna vannamo manasula
Thingal vandhu ulaavum pothu
Enna vannamo ninappula

Kangal aayiram thevaiya
Kaadhal kaviya paada
Kalaigal aayiram thevaiya
Kaadhal nadanam aada

Unnodu naan irunthaal
Ulagam enathagum
Ulagin mudivillum
Kaadhal thodarum

Thendral vandhu theendum pothu
Enna vannamo manasula

title: Kuyile Kavikuyile
lyrics:
Kuyile kavikuyile
Kuruvi ilam kuruvi
Kaalaiyil paadum paattu

Un isai ketaal nenjam
Uruguthe inbam konjam
Malarukku thene thene
Manasukku naane naane

Kaatrile un paattu
Kalandhu varuthe kettathum
Un paattil en nenjam
Mayangi vizhuthe paarthathum

Kuyile kavikuyile
Kuruvi ilam kuruvi

title: Munbe Vaa
lyrics:
Munbe vaa en anbe vaa
Oone vaa uyire vaa
Naan naana ketten ennai naane
Naan neeya nenjam sonnathe

Poo poova pootha thaalam
Un paatham paduma
En aasaigal un nenjil
Sila kaalam iduma

Nilavidam vaadagai vaangi
Vizhiyinil vaithu konden
Pagal innum pogavillaiye
Iravinil vanthu nindren

Munbe vaa en anbe vaa
Oone vaa uyire vaa

title: Vaseegara
lyrics:
Vaseegara en nenjinikka
Un pon madiyil thoonginal pothum
Athey kanam en uyirum ponal pothum

Nenjathile theeyai vaithu
Nindraal enna aagum
En aasaigal unthan peril
Endrum vaazhum

Muzhu nilavaa unnai kandaen
En kangal irandum minna
Un nizhalil naan nadakka
En paatham irandum inikka

Vaseegara en nenjinikka
Un pon madiyil thoonginal pothum

title: Idhu Varai
lyrics:
Idhu varai illatha uravithu
Ithayathil undana kanavithu
Pazhagida nenaikayil bayam varuthu

Paarthathum paravasam aaguthu
Pesida thudikuthu en manathu
Unnaiye theduthe en kangal

Oru murai unnai paarthaal
Enakulle yetho aaguthu
Un sirippai ketaal
Ulagame azhagaaguthu

Idhu varai illatha uravithu
Ithayathil undana kanavithu

title: Pookal Pookum
lyrics:
Pookal pookum tharunam
Aaruyire paarthatharum
Ulagam maranthu tholainthen

Unnai kanda neram
En nenjil minnal adikum
Unnai thedi varum
En kaadhal thudikum

Iravilum pagalilum
Un ninaivugal thaane
Kaatrilum un paattu
Kekkuthe naane

Pookal pookum tharunam
Aaruyire paarthatharum

title: Neeyum Naanum
lyrics:
Neeyum naanum anbe
Kangal korthukkondu
Vaazhvin ellai sendru

Oru paathiyil naanum
Maru paathiyil neeyum
Iruvarum inaindhaal
Ulagam azhagaagum

Sirippilum azhugaiyilum
Unnodu naane
Idhayam thudikkum
Saththam nee thaane

Neeyum naanum anbe
Kangal korthukkondu

title: Oru Dheivam
lyrics:
Oru dheivam thantha poove
Kanne theneye
Ennai kaakum thaaye

Un paarvaiyil naane
Ennai maranthen thaaye
Un anbil naane
Ennai kandaen thaaye

Iravilum pagalilum
Un madiyil thaane
En urakkam vandhu
Ennai thazhuvum thaane

Oru dheivam thantha poove
Kanne theneye

title: Kangal Edho
lyrics:
Kangal edho theda kalavaada
Nenjam thaanae paada parandhoda

Adi ovvoru raappozhudhum
Ona appadi naan rasichen
Uyir kolludhu onnenappu
Kanmaniye..oh

Oru aayiram vaanavilla
Onpoovizhi kaattudahdi
Adha sattunnu nee marachaa
Naan enna seiven pulla

Kangal edho theda kalavaada
Nenjam thaanae paada parandhoda

Velayaattu pechula vesa oosi eathura
Nee lesaa paakka minnal kottiduthe
Oli paanja onmugam manasoda modhuthe
Nee pesum pechu aiyyo alliduthae

Ennennavo unkitta sollavaum thonudhadaa
Kaadhal vanthe sattunu sallada poduthadaa

title: Mallipoo
lyrics:
Mallipoo vechchu vechchu vaaduthu
Andha velli nila vanthu vanthu theduthu
Machaan eppo vara pora

En usuru thudikuthu
Unnai paaka nenaikuthu
Kaalamellam un kooda
Vaazha manam thavikuthu

Pattu selai katti naan
Kaathu kidaiken
En machaan varuvaan nu
Naan paathu kidaiken

Mallipoo vechchu vechchu vaaduthu
Andha velli nila vanthu vanthu theduthu

title: Iravingu Theevai
lyrics:
Iravingu theevai namai chooluthe
Vidiyalum irulaai varuthe
Ninaivugal theeyai alai mothuthe
Udalingu saavai azhuthe

Pirive uruvai karainthu pogiren
Uyirin uyirai pirinthu pogiren
Malaigalin nadhipol manam vazhinthu vanthai
Varanthidum nilathil pala kadalgal thanthai

Kanave thunaiyai ozhinthu poghattum
Iravingu theevai namai chooluthe

Intha thamarai kulam meeri thani aaguthe
Athan sooriyan pagal indri veyil kaayuthe
Oru pathayil iru jeevan thunai theduthe
Ada kaalangal meeri thadai poduthe

Nee indri naane dhinam vazhvathoru vazhva
Vazhve vaa nee thaan uyirin uyire... varavaa

title: Kadhale Kadhale
lyrics:
Kadhale kadhale
Thani perum thunaiye
Kooda vaa kooda vaa

Unnai paartha antha neram
En manathil perum maattram
Kaadhal endra oru vaarthai
Ennai aalum siru vaarthai

Nenjamellam un ninaivu
Kangalil un uruvu
Intha kaadhal endrum vaazhum
Unnodu naan vaazhum varai

Kadhale kadhale
Thani perum thunaiye

title: Vaa Vaathi
lyrics:
Vaa vaathi vaa vaathi
En kooda vaa vaathi
Nee varum pathayil naan iruppen

Un sirippai kandaal
En manathil inbam
Un kuralai ketaal
En ulagam thullum

Kaatril parakkum
En aasaigal ellam
Unnai thedi thaane
Vanthu saerum anbe

Vaa vaathi vaa vaathi
En kooda vaa vaathi

title: Aga Naga
lyrics:
Aga naga muganagaiye
Ithai neeyum arivaaye
En thozhiye en thozhiye

Kaadhal enum theeyil
Naan erigiren anbe
Un ninaivugal ennai
Thurathuthe anbe

Nenjil ulla kaadhal
Ennai aatti padaikkum
Un kangalil naan
Ennai tholaithen

Aga naga muganagaiye
Ithai neeyum arivaaye

title: Vaan Varuvaan
lyrics:
Vaan varuvaan
Naalum nallu vanthu nindru
Kaadhal pesuvaan

Kaatril aadum koonthal
Unnai thedi aalaiyum
Kaadhal enum mozhiyil
En manathum thullum

Unnai kanda neram
En ulagam maarum
Inba thene unnai
Naan enni thavikkiren

Vaan varuvaan
Naalum nallu vanthu nindru

title: Ondra Renda
lyrics:
Ondra renda aasaigal
Ellaam sollave oru naal podhuma
Anbe urangaathirezhu
Idhu thoongum nerama

Kanavu vanthaal
Athil unthan bimbam
Ninaivu vanthaal
Athil unthan geetham

Nenjamellam un ninaivu
Kangalil un uruvu
Intha kaadhal endrum vaazhum
Unnodu naan vaazhum varai

Ondra renda aasaigal
Ellaam sollave oru naal podhuma

title: Sara Sara Saara Kaathu
lyrics:
Sara sara saara kaathu
Veesum pothu
Sirikkithu en manasu

Maan kuttin pole
Naan thulli kuthikka
Unnai kandu naane
Ennai tholaikka

Poovukkulle thean irukku
En manasukkulle un ninaivurukku
Kaatru vanthu thottu sella
Kaadhal enum mozhi pesa

Sara sara saara kaathu
Veesum pothu
Sirikkithu en manasu
